nuke_shell.title: Craft a Nuclear Shell (Create Nuclear Shell / Cannon Nukes mod — requires steel reactor components)

steel_reactor.title: Build a Steel Reactor (Create Nuclear Shell — enables nuclear processing, required for nuke shell crafting)

subtitle.text: Create Big Cannons can fire nuclear shells. You do not have to use this knowledge. You just have it now.

description: Create Big Cannons (Ch06-07) → Create Nuclear Shell → Nuclear Shell ammunition
Requires the Steel Reactor multiblock from Create Nuclear Shell mod.
The Steel Reactor processes uranium/advanced materials into nuclear components.
Uranium is available through Create Oppenheimered (Ch10 automation chain).
The Nuclear Shell fires from a Create Big Cannon.
It is the most destructive single-fire weapon in the modpack.
After the first Trinity test, Oppenheimer quoted the Bhagavad Gita:
'Now I am become Death, the destroyer of worlds.'
He also spent the rest of his life trying to prevent the weapons from being used.
